pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Dallas latitude is approximately 32.7767, and task instructions explicitly require this value.
Web search confirmed Dallas longitude is approximately -96.7970, and task instructions explicitly require 96.7970 W.
Web search confirmed Dallas altitude is approximately 130 meters (430 feet), and task instructions explicitly require 130m.
Web searches confirmed the official NORAD IDs for FO-29 (24278), RS-44 (44909), and AO-73 (39444).
Task instructions explicitly state the file should be saved exactly to ~/Documents/FO29_passes.txt, matching export_result.sh.
Task instructions explicitly state the file should be saved exactly to ~/Documents/RS44_passes.txt, matching export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: I verified via web searches that the requested NORAD IDs correctly correspond to the satellites FO-29 (24278), RS-44 (44909), and AO-73 (39444). The requested geographic coordinates (32.7767, -96.7970) and altitude (130m) accurately map to Dallas, Texas, and match the task instructions. The expected export file paths (/home/ga/Documents/FO29_passes.txt and /home/ga/Documents/RS44_passes.txt) match the explicit instructions and export_result.sh checks. Additionally, I discovered that the task is defective because verifier.py is completely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
